bead.title: service: assemble routing model snapshots from ServiceConfig
bead.description:
CONTEXT
The unified enriched model view currently has a CLI-oriented assembly path: `agentcli/models.go` loads `internal/config.Config`, catalog, discovery cache, then calls `modelregistry.AssembleWithOptions`. Root service routing uses `ServiceConfig` and still builds `routing.Inputs` directly. SD-005 requires `ResolveRoute`, `RouteStatus`, root `ListModels`, and `fiz models` to share the same assembled snapshot.

CHANGE
Add a service-side snapshot assembly helper that accepts root `ServiceConfig`, catalog, cache root/refresh policy, and returns `modelregistry.ModelSnapshot` without importing `agentcli`. The helper should preserve ADR-012 stale-while-revalidate/default refresh semantics and make cache root injectable for tests.

IN-SCOPE FILES
- internal/modelregistry/ or a new internal service snapshot adapter package
- internal/config/serviceconfig.go if conversion helpers are needed
- service_* test fixtures needed for parity

OUT-OF-SCOPE
- Rewriting root `ListModels`.
- Rewriting `ResolveRoute`.
- Changing public ServiceConfig methods unless absolutely required and covered by tests.
bead.acceptance:
1. `go test ./internal/modelregistry/... -run "ServiceConfig|Snapshot|Assemble" -count=1` passes with fixture coverage proving an equivalent `ServiceConfig` and `internal/config.Config` produce the same provider/model/endpoint rows.
2. `go test . -run "Test.*Snapshot.*ServiceConfig|Test.*ServiceConfig.*Snapshot" -count=1` passes or the equivalent root package test name added by the implementation passes.
3. `rg -n "agentcli" internal/modelregistry service_*.go` returns no matches, proving the root service snapshot path does not import CLI code.
